A NWS STORM SURVEY INDICATED THAT A BRIEF AND WEAK EF-0 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN JUST NORTH OF BOLIVAR ALONG ROCKET ROAD. THERE WAS DAMAGE TO SEVERAL OUTBUILDINGS AND BARNS. ONE BARN WAS COMPLETELY DESTROYED. A TRUCK WAS SEVERELY DAMAGED FROM DEBRIS. ONE HOME HAD SEVERE ROOF DAMAGE. THE PATH WAS APPROXIMATELY 1 MILE LONG AND 100 YARDS WIDE WITH WINDS ESTIMATED UP TO 80 MPH.
